strengths: Experience with large datasets and data modeling
Quantified impact on reporting and operations
weaknesses: Few examples of Snowflake usage in projects
improvement_bullets: Developed automated reporting frameworks for inventory and promotional performance, facilitating self-service analytics for cross-functional stakeholders and reducing manual data requests by 40%.
Optimized data workflows in Snowflake and SQL to analyze retail sales and merchandising trends, ensuring high reporting accuracy for critical inventory KPIs.
Led data-driven initiatives to categorize customer segments, directly influencing merchandising strategies and optimizing promotional planning in a fast-paced retail-oriented environment.
Implemented automated monitoring and validation scripts for large datasets, ensuring reporting accuracy across multiple BI platforms for leadership decision-making.
Designed and executed end-to-end ETL pipelines in Snowflake, transforming complex raw data into actionable merchandising insights that informed high-level inventory and pricing strategies.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the MBA Consultant, Merchandising Analytics & Reporting opportunity with 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, INC. I am interested in this opportunity because of the company's commitment to leveraging data to enhance the gift-giving experience, which perfectly aligns with my background in transforming complex data sets into actionable business insights. What interests me about working for 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, INC. is its innovative approach to eCommerce and personalized consumer experiences, which intrigues me because it highlights the necessity of precise merchandising analytics in a competitive digital marketplace. I believe my expertise in BI dashboard development and my proficiency in SQL and Snowflake would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating technical data into clear, executive-ready narratives. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I identified a need for better visibility into performance, so I developed interactive Power BI dashboards that replaced manual processes. This project reduced data processing time by 40% and directly empowered executive leadership to make faster, data-backed decisions that fueled a 300% increase in customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the MBA Consultant, Merchandising Analytics & Reporting role at 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, INC. would allow me to bring my passion for reporting automation to streamline your merchandising and planning processes. Additionally, my role as a Data Analytics Fellow at COOP Careers enabled me to develop my data modeling skills. I analyzed a 250K+ row dataset to uncover demographic patterns that directly supported stakeholders in city safety initiatives. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in large-scale data analysis in working on merchandising, promotional, and performance data at 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, INC. I know that my analytical problem-solving and technical versatility align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
